mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todos (user_id, title, due_date, priority, is_completed, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{dueDate}, #{priority}, #{isCompleted}, NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id, title, due_date, priority, is_completed, created_at FROM todos WHERE user_id = #{userId}
ORDER BY due_date ASC
ORDER BY priority DESC, due_date ASC
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM todos WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
